title: Lace Loungewear Product Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Lace Loungewear Product Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Hero Subject: adult female model in champagne satin lounge dress with lace trim and matching robe, fully covered elegant styling. Scene / Context: soft neutral bedroom campaign, fabric texture and product silhouette emphasized. Source Recipe Translation: safe lace loungewear product portrait. Preserve these source mechanics: soft bedroom product campaign, realistic premium fashion photography, warm diffuse window light, elegant adult non-explicit styling. Concrete social variant uses adult female model in champagne satin lounge dress with lace trim and matching robe, fully covered elegant styling in soft neutral bedroom campaign, fabric texture and product silhouette emphasized. Composition: vertical 4:5 or 2:3 social-poster composition with a strong central focal subject and clean negative space; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5 or 2:3 unless the source layout requires otherwise; keep the main subject readable in a small thumbnail and center-safe for X crop previews. Style System: soft bedroom product campaign, realistic premium fashion photography, warm diffuse window light, elegant adult non-explicit styling; polished editorial finish, strong first-glance contrast, clean hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: no visible text; English-only readable text if text is part of the design; otherwise no visible text. Social Safety and Publishing Constraints: fictionalized social-safe version of the source prompt; adult-safe styling; real brands, logos, teams, and public-figure likenesses replaced with fictional/generic equivalents; no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter.
